prompt: A high-fashion perfume advertisement shot in a vibrant, retro-futuristic studio setting. In the extreme foreground, a large hand dramatically reaches toward the camera with fingers slightly spread, creating a forced-perspective illusion. Centered in the mid-ground sits a round, soft peach-pink glass perfume bottle labeled "DUNE — Eau de Toilette — Christian Dior Paris" with a rose-gold spherical cap and rose-gold collar. In the background, a young woman with a short brown bob haircut and blunt bangs wears oversized white cat-eye sunglasses, a pastel pink satin bomber jacket, a white crop top, and a denim mini skirt. She leans forward with an expression of surprise or desire, as if reaching for the bottle. The environment is a clean studio box with bright cyan/sky-blue walls, white geometric floor panels with blue stripe accents. Lighting is sharp, editorial, and high-contrast with soft shadows. The overall mood is playful, bold, and modern with a Y2K aesthetic. Shot with a wide-angle lens to exaggerate depth and scale. Photorealistic, commercial photography style.
